d: Hodgkin fires a cannon at each enemy hero in sequence, dealing [[320%]]<ATK> damage to the hit enemy and their adjacent enemies. Allies adjacent to the hit enemy will also take [[100%]]<ATK> damage. If any unit is hit by the cannon more than twice, the damage from subsequent hits is reduced to [[20%]]. Hodgkin can fire at least 5 cannons with this skill.
Increases cannon damage to [[330%]]<ATK>.
Increases cannon damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increases cannon damage to [[350%]]<ATK>.
Increases cannon damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.

Hodgkin enters an ethereal state for [[8]]s, during which he is immune to physical damage and recovers [[70%]]<ATK> HP per second.
Passive. When Hodgkin casts Cannon Fire, he immediately enters the ethereal state for [[4]]s.
Recovers [[80%]]<ATK> HP per second during ethereal state.
Recovers [[90%]]<ATK> HP per second during ethereal state.
Recovers [[100%]]<ATK> HP per second during ethereal state.
Hodgkin deals [[240%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within a 2-tile arc and steals [[70]] Energy from them.
Increases damage dealt to [[260%]]<ATK> and Energy stolen to [[80]].
Increases damage dealt to [[280%]]<ATK> and Energy stolen to [[90]].
Increases damage dealt to [[300%]]<ATK> and Energy stolen to [[100]].
Hodgkin increases his ATK by [[9%]] during battle. His ATK increases by an extra [[6%]] during his ethereal state.
Hodgkin increases his ATK by [[12%]] during battle. His ATK increases by an extra [[8%]] during his ethereal state.
Hodgkin increases his ATK by [[15%]] during battle. His ATK increases by an extra [[10%]] during his ethereal state.

Hodgkin summons 2 Dead Tide Warriors affected by voidbound magic around him when a battle begins, each inheriting [[60%]] of his HP and [[100%]] of his other stats, and can only launch normal attacks. When a unit affected by voidbound magic is defeated, they trigger an explosion that deals damage equal to [[120%]]<ATK> plus an extra [[10%]] of the defeated unit's max HP to the adjacent enemies. This extra damage cannot exceed [[200%]]<ATK> of Hodgkin's ATK. The targeted enemies also lose [[200]] Energy.
Increases explosion damage to [[140%]]<ATK>.

Applies voidbound magic to any unit hit by Cannon Fire that does not already have it. The energy loss from this kind of explosion is reduced to [[70%]]. The skill also applies voidbound magic to Breakable Walls within range.
Increases explosion damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 Vitality, 18 Crit Resist.

d: Hodgkin reduces the Phys DEF of enemies hit by the cannon by [[15%]], up to [[2]] stacks, for [[10]]s.
Hodgkin gains [[400]] initial Energy. During Cannon Fire, for each enemy hit by the cannon at least [[2]] times, he recovers [[150]] Energy and reduces that enemy's Vitality by [[80]] for [[10]]s.
